name: Mohamed Ismail
title: Product Designer & Design Strategist
bio: Strategic product designer specializing in AI-augmented workflows and behavioral design. Proven track record driving measurable business impact across Egypt and Saudi Arabia markets. I design systems that scale—from interaction layer to business outcomes.

experience.desc: Driving product strategy for Egypt's largest home décor platform serving 2M+ users. Implemented AI-augmented product recommendations lifting mobile conversion by 28%. Led design system architecture reducing design debt by 40%.
Designed end-to-end platform UX for Saudi market. Reduced user onboarding drop-off by 41% through behavioral design patterns. Delivered 12+ high-fidelity prototypes validated through user testing.

Redesigned learning platform UI improving course completion rates by 19%. Created modular design system enabling 60% faster design iteration. Collaborated with product team on data-driven feature prioritization.

Crafted mobile-first interfaces for logistics platform. Reduced checkout abandonment by 24% through streamlined UX and behavioral nudges. Established consistent visual language across 8+ product flows.

projects.title: Homzmart App Redesign
projects.desc: Complete mobile redesign for Egypt's largest home décor marketplace. Lifted mobile conversion by 28% through behavioral design optimization. Implemented AI-powered product discovery increasing AOV by 18%.

projects.title: Cradis Platform UX
projects.desc: End-to-end platform redesign reducing onboarding drop-off by 41%. Conducted 16 user interviews informing interaction patterns. Delivered design system enabling 12-week faster release cycle.

projects.title: Learning Platform UI
projects.desc: Redesigned educational platform interface increasing course completion by 19%. Built modular component library reducing design time by 60%. A/B tested 8 variations of course path layouts.

projects.title: Route Product Design
projects.desc: Mobile product redesign reducing checkout abandonment by 24%. Implemented behavioral nudges and progressive disclosure patterns. Established design system unifying 8+ product flows.

testimonials.name: Ahmed El-Sayed
testimonials.quote: Mohamed elevated our design thinking to the next level. His AI-augmented approach to product recommendations drove a 28% conversion lift. Strategic, data-driven, and deeply user-centric.

testimonials.name: Sara Hassan
testimonials.quote: Mohamed's behavioral design expertise reduced our onboarding drop-off by 41%. He doesn't just make things look good—he makes them work. A true design strategist.

testimonials.name: Omar Khalil
testimonials.quote: Mohamed transformed our platform with his data-driven design approach. He increased course completion by 19% and built a design system that accelerated our entire roadmap.

testimonials.name: Nada Fouad
testimonials.quote: Strategic, creative, and results-obsessed. Mohamed delivered a 24% reduction in checkout abandonment through behavioral design. He raised the bar for what we expect from design.
